Core features

Built for the moments
that actually matter.

Every feature answers one question: what does a traveler need when things go wrong?

❤️
Family Safety
Share your journey,
keep your privacy.

Create a private circle of trusted contacts who see your location only when you choose. Parents check in without hovering. Partners breathe easy. Your journey stays yours.

⚡
AI Monitoring
Real-time protection

Our AI quietly reads your environment, movement patterns, and local risk data — so you always have an invisible safety net, even when you're offline in a remote village.

⚡
Instant Location Share
One-tap SOS

A single press shares your live location, last-known route, and ambient audio to your trusted circle and local emergency services — globally, in seconds.

🔑
Blockchain Identity
Trusted digital ID

Your sovereign identity — verifiable at borders and checkpoints, without surrendering sensitive documents to strangers.

How it works

Three steps.
Total peace of mind.

Designed to be invisible until you need it — then instant.

01
🧭
Plan & explore

Tell Protegeo your itinerary. It loads live safety data, local emergency numbers, and flags high-risk zones before you leave home.

02
🌍
Monitor silently

A quiet AI runs in the background — no constant pings, no battery drain. Just calm awareness adapting as your context changes.

03
❤️
Respond fast

One tap triggers your full safety protocol — location shared, situation logged, contacts alerted, local help dispatched. Under 3 seconds.

The world is beautiful. Explore it safely.
🌿 Bali, Indonesia
🏯 Kyoto, Japan
🧡 Marrakech, Morocco
🗼 Paris, France
🤍 Santorini, Greece

🏔️ Machu Picchu, Peru

Built for you

Whether you wander alone
or manage thousands.

👤 For travelers
Travelers & Families

Whether you're a solo adventurer, a parent tracking a child abroad, or a group navigating an unfamiliar city — Protegeo is your invisible safety net.

  • Solo & female traveler safety mode
  • Private location sharing with trusted circles
  • Emergency contacts & local SOS alerts
  • Journey logs with offline access
Learn more →
🏙️ For partners
Cities & Tourism partners

Access aggregated risk intelligence, improve your destination's safety rating, and integrate Protegeo into your existing tourism infrastructure.

  • Real-time safety heatmaps & analytics
  • Incident reporting & trend analysis
  • API & white-label integration
  • Tourism operator safety dashboards
Learn more →
What travelers say

Real stories.
Real peace of mind.

★★★★★

I solo-travelled Southeast Asia for three months. Knowing Protegeo had my back meant I actually enjoyed the trip instead of second-guessing every decision.

Sara M.
Solo traveler, 28 — London
★★★★★

My daughter spent a gap year in South America. Protegeo gave us both what we needed — she had freedom, I had a little less grey hair.

Rajan K.
Father of two — Mumbai
★★★★★

The one-tap SOS saved me when I had a fall in rural Portugal. Help arrived in under 4 minutes. I genuinely don't want to travel without this anymore.

Amara T.
Adventure traveler — Nairobi
Why Protegeo

Designed for trust.
Built for the real world.

🧠
AI-first design

Built from the ground up around intelligence — not bolted on. Protegeo adapts to your environment in real time, learning what normal looks like for you.

📍
Location intelligence

Precise, privacy-respecting location data plus live local feeds. Awareness without unnecessary surveillance — tracked only when you choose.

🔒
Secure by design

End-to-end encryption on all data. Your identity lives on-device or on-chain — never sold, never shared without your explicit permission.
